lessons.title: Creation
lessons.introduction: In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth.

sections.title: Day 1: Light
sections.content: God said, "Let there be light," and there was light.

sections.title: Day 2: Sky
sections.content: God made the sky to separate the waters.

lessons.title: Noah's Ark
lessons.introduction: God told Noah to build an ark to save his family and the animals from a great flood.

sections.title: Building the Ark
sections.content: Noah and his sons built the ark according to God's instructions.

sections.title: The Flood
sections.content: The floodwaters covered the earth for 40 days and 40 nights.

lessons.title: The Ten Commandments
lessons.introduction: God gave Moses the Ten Commandments on Mount Sinai.

sections.title: The First Four Commandments
sections.content: These commandments are about our relationship with God.

sections.title: The Last Six Commandments
sections.content: These commandments are about our relationship with others.

lessons.title: The Book of Romans
lessons.introduction: The book of Romans is a letter written by the apostle Paul to the church in Rome.

sections.title: Justification by Faith
sections.content: Paul teaches that we are saved by faith in Jesus Christ, not by our own works.

sections.title: Living in the Spirit
sections.content: Paul encourages us to live a life that is pleasing to God.

sections.title: His Humanity
sections.content: Jesus was fully human, and he experienced all the things that we do.

sections.title: His Deity
sections.content: Jesus is also fully God, and he has all the power and authority of God.
